pr.title: Record: Fused LeakyReLU² + Online GPTQ + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.117 (1-seed)

output.summary: Fuses Triton LeakyReLU² MLP kernel, online Hessian GPTQ, and selective ±1 pruning with Parallel Muon to hit the 16MB budget.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Normal training plus sliding-window evaluation; no val-only training.
techniques: Fused Triton LeakyReLU² MLP kernel for 33% faster steps
Online Hessian GPTQ accumulation every 25 steps
Selective ±1 pruning post-INT6 for artifact sizing
